description: Logto is an identity and access management platform for adding authentication, authorization, user management, and multi-tenancy to applications. It offers both a hosted cloud service and open-source/self-hosted deployment options.
summary: Logto exposes a tenant-scoped Management REST API, a Logto Cloud REST API for tenant automation, a remote MCP server at mcp.logto.io, and an OSS CLI distributed on npm.
